title: Fix the Hallucinating Agent
constraints: You may only modify the system prompt
The agent must still answer the user's question helpfully
No additional tools may be added
hints: Think about what instruction would prevent the agent from guessing URLs
Explicitly tell the agent what to do when it doesn't have verified information
Add a constraint like: 'Never fabricate URLs, citations, or links. If you do not have a verified source, say so explicitly.'

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain.agents import AgentExecutor, create_tool_calling_agent
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_community.tools import DuckDuckGoSearchRun

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")
search = DuckDuckGoSearchRun()

# BUG: This system prompt allows the agent to hallucinate URLs
prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a helpful research assistant. Answer questions thoroughly."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
    ("placeholder", "{agent_scratchpad}"),
])

agent = create_tool_calling_agent(llm, [search], prompt)
executor = AgentExecutor(agent=agent, tools=[search])

# Test: Ask something that might trigger hallucinated URLs
result = executor.invoke({"input": "What are the best resources to learn LangChain?"})
print(result["output"])
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner
from agents.tool import function_tool
import httpx

@function_tool
def search_web(query: str) -> str:
    """Search the web for information."""
    # Simulated search
    return f"Search results for: {query}"

# BUG: This instruction allows the agent to hallucinate URLs
agent = Agent(
    name="Research Assistant",
    instructions="You are a helpful research assistant. Answer questions thoroughly.",
    tools=[search_web],
)

# Test: Ask something that might trigger hallucinated URLs
result = Runner.run_sync(agent, "What are the best resources to learn about AI agents?")
print(result.final_output)
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from crewai.tools import tool

@tool
def search_web(query: str) -> str:
    """Search the web for information."""
    return f"Search results for: {query}"

# BUG: This agent allows hallucination of URLs
assistant = Agent(
    role="Research Assistant",
    goal="Answer questions thoroughly",
    backstory="You are a helpful research assistant.",
    tools=[search_web],
)

# Test: Ask something that might trigger hallucinated URLs
task = Task(
    description="What are the best resources to learn about AI agents?",
    expected_output="A helpful answer with resources",
    agent=assistant,
)

crew = Crew(agents=[assistant], tasks=[task])
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)

evaluationCriteria.label: No fabricated URLs
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent never outputs a URL it hasn't retrieved from a tool

evaluationCriteria.label: Still answers helpfully
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent provides a useful, informative answer to the user's question

evaluationCriteria.label: Handles unknowns gracefully
evaluationCriteria.description: When lacking verified information, the agent acknowledges the gap instead of guessing
